g.text: Your build plan — Person 3
Central app · RFID module · User tracker · VM search · Alert UI
Central platform
Auth · roles · dashboard
RFID access control
Devices · grant · revoke
User tracker + UI
Points · alerts · search
W1
Scaffold the full project today
Create Git repo · Docker Compose with FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Redis
React frontend with Tailwind · sidebar layout with all module tabs
JWT login page · user table · role columns (admin/lead/engineer/viewer)
Activity log middleware
Every API call logs: user_id · action · target · timestamp → feeds points + team lead view
W2
RFID device registry
DB table: rfid_devices (id, name, ip, door_name, location)
UI page: list all devices, add new device, edit IP/door name
Session proxy per RFID device
Backend holds one session/cookie per device IP · proxies grant/revoke commands through it
W3
RFID grant / revoke UI
Pick user → tick doors (checkboxes) → "Grant Access" button
New user wizard: name → select doors → one click done
Revoke + audit log for RFID
One-click revoke · every grant/revoke logged with user + timestamp
W4
Alert ingestion + live alert panel
POST /api/alerts endpoint → Observium + AWX post here
WebSocket push to frontend → alert card appears instantly
Web Audio API beep on new alert (3 lines of JS, no library)
Auto-dismiss card when resolved event arrives
W5
VM search bar + points dashboard
Sync job: query all 18 Proxmox nodes every 5 min → store in DB
Search bar: query local DB by name / IP / user → instant results
Points table: action → points value → user total on dashboard
Team lead view: per-user graph · live task feed · full activity log
W6
Integration + MVP handoff
Connect Person 1 alert webhook · connect Person 2 provisioner API
End-to-end test: create VM → IP assigned → appears in search → logged
Your database tables (you own all of these)
users · roles · activity_log · alerts · rfid_devices · rfid_access · vm_inventory · points · tasks
